description: Product Description Handkerchiefs are one of the quintessential accessories that a man can carry. The handy nature of this piece of cloth makes it of great use for a gentleman. Besides being useful for hygiene, it is considered to be chivalrous on a man’s part to carry a handkerchief as one can lend it to a woman if required. Style Square brings to you Cotton Handkerchiefs that are designed to serve this exact same purpose. These large hankies for men feature a graceful design that adds an elegant touch to a man’s attire. Suitable for All Occasions: Multiple Uses These plain handkerchiefs look classy on every occasion. You can use to cover your face while sneezing or as an emergency mask. You can even lend it to someone who is in need of a hanky as the elegant design of these handkerchiefs is sure to amaze the user. These handkerchiefs are great for weddings, office use, casual outings, travel etc. Care Instructions To make hankies soft and comfortable, wash them before first use. Hand wash in cold or warm water May shrink slightly after first wash Use mild detergent Iron if needed Features Made From Cotton These handkerchiefs are crafted using premium cotton material which is very soft and durable in nature. The fabric has good tear strength as well, thereby allowing you to use it on a regular basis. The 100% cotton material makes these hankies highly absorbent. Classy Design These handkerchiefs come perfectly stitched, which makes them very practical. These plain white, elegant and classy-looking handkerchiefs are a great addition to any man’s wardrobe due to their versatile nature. Moreover, these hankies are machine washable, making them easy to clean. Great Gift This set of 6 Cotton Handkerchiefs for Men is an ideal gift for your beloved friend or family member. You can gift this set to your father, husband, brother, grandfather or friend on special occasions like Christmas, Valentine’s Day, birthdays, Father’s Day, Men’s Day etc.
